titles.title: I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen

data.title: Zhan Shen: Fanchen Shenyu
title_synonyms: I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen
data.synopsis:
It follows the journey of Lin Qiye, a blind high school student who unexpectedly becomes a night watchman, tasked with protecting the nation from "mystical" invasions as the mist descends and gods reawaken. Leading his team, he tirelessly eliminates mythical creatures that emerge in modern society and eventually sets out on the path of god-slaying, evolving from guarding his small family to defending the nation.

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Sanjiu Yinyu's (三九音域) novel, Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen (我在精神病院学斩神).

data.title: Aikatsu Academy!
data.synopsis: The series will follow three new idols in training: Himeno Mieru, Mamimu Meh and Wao Parin. But since they're currently unknown, they decide to do their own advertising and gather a fanbase. Together, they form the Aikatsu Academy! Streaming Club to record and broadcast their idol activities.

titles.title: Shirobuta Kizoku desu ga Zense no Kioku ga Haeta node Hiyoko na Otouto Sodatemasu
but With the Memories of My Previous Life
白豚貴族ですが前世の記憶が生えたのでひよこな弟育てます
Shirohiyo - Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life

data.title: Shirobuta Kizoku desu ga Zense no Kioku ga Haeta node Hiyoko na Otouto Sodatemasu
data.title_english: Shirohiyo - Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life
data.title_japanese: 白豚貴族ですが前世の記憶が生えたのでひよこな弟育てます
title_synonyms: but With the Memories of My Previous Life
data.synopsis:
In a world where Western and Asian cultures mix together, the only son of Count Kikunoi from the Kiryuu Empire, is Ageha. His life was already over at the age of 5. He, who was born in a corner of the country, has zero allies or useful skills in addition to being overweight. What's more, it seems that his brother Regulus, who suddenly appeared on his life and was presented for the Count as his brother, will kill him in the future for his right to succeed...

His only weapons, are the abilities of "cooking and sewing," that he suddenly acquired along with the memories of his previous Japanese life. In the midst of all this, Ageha ends up raising his younger brother, but... "My brother is super cute?" And before he knows it, he becomes a full-blown doting older brother?!

Making handmade educational toys for his cute little brother and delicious chawanmushi (steamed egg custard)... With the help of his previous life's skills and my power as a housekeeper, he's able to improve the rough life of the people living in his territory. A fantasy of two young brothers managing their territory, where a single step gets even the gods involved in changing their country!

(Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

titles.title: The Story of a Common Family

data.title: Keihin Kazoku
data.title_english: The Story of a Common Family
data.synopsis:
Satoshi Totsugawa, a 39-year-old man working at a small advertising agency in the city, is proud, vain, and full of complexes. He laments his own situation, which is far below his wife's annual income, is manipulated by a poor junior at work, and cannot hide his infidelity from a fellow designer. He is a middle-aged man who is on the path to a life of complaints. But then Satoshi is appointed head of the apartment building association, and is manipulated by the eccentric residents! Set in the ultra-futuristic tower apartment building "Keihin Grand Solenase" that towers into the sky above Keihin, this is a realistic, yet comical and loving portrayal of modern people's communication patterns.

(Source: Wikipedia, translated)

data.title: Shen Wu Tianzun
data.synopsis:
The only body cultivator in the nine realms was betrayed by his close friend Li Yunfei, and his body and soul disappeared. By chance, his soul remained immortal, and unexpectedly happened to Xiao Chen, a dying disciple of Qingyun Sect. After rebirth, Xiao Chen not only resurrected, but also awakened his supreme magical power. He also vowed to take back everything that belonged to him, and walked out on his own magical path as the "Venerable God".

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
